query:
INSERT INTO rewards (name, description, pointsCost, discountType, discountValue, minPurchase, isActive) VALUES
('$5 Off Your Order', 'Get $5 off any purchase of $25 or more', 500, 'fixed_amount', 500, 2500, 'yes'),
('$10 Off Your Order', 'Get $10 off any purchase of $50 or more', 1000, 'fixed_amount', 1000, 5000, 'yes'),
('10% Off Entire Order', 'Save 10% on your entire purchase', 750, 'percentage', 10, 0, 'yes'),
('15% Off Entire Order', 'Save 15% on your entire purchase', 1500, 'percentage', 15, 0, 'yes'),
('Free Shipping', 'Get free shipping on your next order', 300, 'free_shipping', 0, 0, 'yes'),
('$25 Off Premium Order', 'Get $25 off any purchase of $100 or more', 2500, 'fixed_amount', 2500, 10000, 'yes');
